VectorBackendType.docstring: Type-safe enumeration of vector database backends.

VectorDatabase.docstring:
Abstract base class for vector database operations.
    Defines the contract that all vector database implementations must implement.

default_capabilities.docstring:
Get default capabilities that apply to all instances of this vector database.
        Use for class-level capability declarations.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of default capabilities with their supported values

capabilities.docstring:
Get instance-specific capabilities for this vector database.
        By default uses class default_capabilities, but can be overridden
        for instance-specific variations.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities with their supported values

negotiate_capabilities.docstring:
Negotiate capabilities between consumer and provider.
        
        Args:
            requested_capabilities: Capabilities requested by consumer
            
        Returns:
            Dictionary of supported capabilities that will be provided
            
        Type Policy:
            - Set-based capabilities: Always returned as lists
              because they represent multiple concurrent capabilities
            - Mode selection capabilities: Returned as scalars when only
              one value is requested and matched, to simplify usage for consumers

store_vectors.docstring:
Store vectors in the database.
        
        Args:
            vectors: List of vectors to store
            metadata: Optional metadata for each vector (same length as vectors)
            ids: Optional custom IDs for vectors (generated if not provided)
            collection: Optional collection/namespace name
            
        Returns:
            Dictionary with operation results

search_vectors.docstring:
Search for similar vectors.
        
        Args:
            query_vector: Vector to search for
            top_k: Number of results to return
            filter_expr: Optional filter expression for metadata
            collection: Optional collection/namespace name
            metric: Similarity metric to use
            include_metadata: Whether to include metadata in results
            include_vectors: Whether to include vector data in results
            
        Returns:
            List of vector search results

delete_vectors.docstring:
Delete vectors by ID or filter expression.
        
        Args:
            ids: Optional list of vector IDs to delete
            filter_expr: Optional filter expression to match vectors to delete
            collection: Optional collection/namespace name
            
        Returns:
            Dictionary with operation results

create_collection.docstring:
Create a new vector collection/index.
        
        Args:
            name: Collection name
            dimensions: Vector dimensions
            metric: Similarity metric
            metadata_schema: Optional schema for metadata fields
            
        Returns:
            Dictionary with operation results

ConnectionConfiguration.docstring:
Abstract base class for vector database connection configuration.
    Provides standardized access to connection parameters across backends.

get_connection_params.docstring:
Get parameters required for establishing a connection.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of connection parameters

get_options.docstring:
Get additional options for configuring the database.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of additional options

from_settings.docstring:
Create configuration from Django settings.
        
        Args:
            settings_dict: Optional settings dictionary (uses Django settings if not provided)
            
        Returns:
            ConnectionConfiguration instance

from_env.docstring:
Create configuration from environment variables.
        
        Returns:
            ConnectionConfiguration instance

VectorAdapter.docstring:
Integration interface for adapting vectors between subsystems.
    Establishes formal boundary between vector subsystem and other subsystems.

default_capabilities.docstring:
Get default capabilities that apply to all instances of this adapter.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of default capabilities with their supported values

capabilities.docstring:
Get instance-specific capabilities for this adapter.
        By default uses class default_capabilities, but can be overridden
        for instance-specific variations.
        
        Returns:
            Dictionary of capabilities with their supported values

adapt_vector.docstring:
Adapt a vector to the target format and dimensions.
        
        Args:
            vector: Input vector in any supported format
            target_format: Desired output format
            target_dimensions: Optional target dimensions (if resizing needed)
            
        Returns:
            Adapted vector in the target format and dimensions
